summary: Audit all personal-track assets (4 sites + monetization + game) to find iteration opportunities

audits.area: Personal hub qizh.space (repo /home/test/Zion-site, GitHub Pages rAIn0x7/Zion-site)
audits.current: Live site is byte-identical to local repo (index.html 30196B, writing.html 6328B both diff-clean); last deploy commit 7c6e7b9 2026-06-03 (FingerMOBA tile). Pages: index, writing, about, privacy, 3 post-*.html + 1 orphaned post.html. Content: 3 original essays dated MAR/APR/MAY 2026 (newest "Vibe Coding" = MAY 11, 2026, post.html:291 → 30 days stale vs the "每周一篇" promise repeated on index.html:278 and writing.html:57); each essay only ~1,160-1,380 Chinese chars. AdSense script ca-pub-2184467660826262 on all 8 pages (line 8 of each) but ads.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt all 404 on live and absent from repo. CRITICAL: HTTPS is broken — https://qizh.space serves the fallback *.github.io cert ("subjectAltName does not match qizh.space", cert issued Apr 6 2026); curl exit 60 on qizh.space, www.qizh.space AND lens.qizh.space; only plain HTTP returns 200. DNS itself is correct (CNAME → rain0x7.github.io), so the GitHub Pages custom-domain cert was never provisioned or got dropped. Ventures: 4 tiles (index.html:251-254) but hero stat claims "2 Ventures" (index.html:228); FingerMOBA link returns 200 yet its live page loads Phaser 3.80.1 while the tile says "3v3 MOBA…Godot 引擎" (index.html:254); CryptoLens tile hardlinks https://lens.qizh.space which fails SSL. Subscribe form is fake — handleSubscribe (index.html:361) hides the form and shows success without sending anywhere; "500+ Readers" (index.html:229) and "500+ builders & investors already reading" (index.html:279) are unbacked claims. Contact = qq-mailto + GitHub only; zero 公众号/知识星球/WeChat presence anywhere (grep across *.html: no hits). SEO: title+meta description exist on main pages, but no OG/twitter tags, no canonical, no favicon on any page.
working: Deploy pipeline healthy: live exactly matches local main (index+writing diff-identical), git tree clean apart from untracked .idea/ and ~7MB of local PNG screenshots
AdSense verification script present on all 8 HTML pages (ca-pub-2184467660826262, line 8 each)
privacy.html exists, linked in every footer, and covers Google/AdSense/cookies/advertising (5x AdSense, 6x cookie mentions)
3 genuinely original Chinese essays with consistent design, working internal links (writing.html:60-77 -> post-*.html all 200)
FingerMOBA tile target https://rain0x7.github.io/fingermoba/ returns 200 and the game loads (Phaser via CDN)
DNS is correctly configured: qizh.space CNAME -> rain0x7.github.io, www A-records to GitHub Pages IPs
Contact mailto (1733680684@qq.com, index.html:291) and GitHub link work; mobile nav + reduced-motion fallbacks implemented

issues.what: HTTPS broken site-wide: https://qizh.space (and www + lens.qizh.space) serve the *.github.io fallback cert — browsers show a full security warning, so the site is effectively unreachable for normal visitors and the AdSense crawler. DNS is fine; the Pages custom-domain certificate needs re-provisioning (re-save custom domain / Enforce HTTPS in repo settings for BOTH Zion-site and the lens repo).
ads.txt missing (http://qizh.space/ads.txt -> 404). AdSense flags this and can hold/limit approval. Needs one line: google.com, pub-2184467660826262, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0

Subscribe is a dead end: form at index.html:280 captures nothing (handleSubscribe index.html:361 just hides the form — comment admits 'wire to Substack/Supabase backend later'). Every interested reader is silently lost; no 公众号 QR, no 知识星球 link anywhere on the site — the entire paid funnel has zero entry point.

Content stale for AdSense review: newest article May 11 2026 (~30 days ago) despite '每周一篇' promised in 3 places; only 3 essays at ~1.1-1.4k chars each (thin); orphaned post.html duplicates the Vibe Coding post title verbatim (duplicate-content risk).

Dishonest/stale numbers and text: hero says '2 Ventures' but shows 4 tiles (index.html:228 vs 251-254); '500+ Readers'/'500+ builders already reading' (index.html:229,279) unbacked while subscribe has no backend; FingerMOBA tile describes 'Godot 3v3 MOBA' but the live game is a Phaser survivor (index.html:254); essay title still says '2025 怎么用 AI 给自己装杠杆' dated APR 2026.
SEO gaps: no sitemap.xml, no robots.txt (both 404), no OG/twitter meta, no canonical, no favicon on any page; privacy.html lacks meta description. Hurts indexing and social sharing of articles.
CryptoLens tile hardlinks https://lens.qizh.space (index.html:252) which currently fails SSL; only 1 of 3 Lens dashboards (Crypto) appears in the portfolio — StockLens/MetalLens absent.
CLAUDE.md drift: documents Email/Twitter/WeChat contact links and 3-card Ventures, actual site has Email/GitHub/Writing and 4 tiles; repo carries ~7MB untracked PNG screenshots + .idea/

iterations.title: Re-provision GitHub Pages HTTPS cert for qizh.space (re-save custom domain, wait for cert, enable Enforce HTTPS; repeat for the lens repo)
iterations.why: Site is effectively down over HTTPS — blocks every visitor, the AdSense review crawler, and all downstream monetization; nothing else matters until this is fixed

iterations.title: Add ads.txt (google.com, pub-2184467660826262, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0) plus sitemap.xml and robots.txt, push once
iterations.why: ads.txt is an explicit AdSense approval requirement; sitemap/robots get the 3 essays indexed so the review sees a real content site

iterations.title: Make the subscribe path real: wire form to Formspree/Supabase OR replace with 公众号 QR + 知识星球 link in #subscribe and #contact
iterations.why: Currently 100% of interested readers are lost; 知识星球 is the designated first-revenue channel and the site has no door to it

iterations.title: Publish 1 new essay now (June) and commit to the weekly cadence already promised; unlink/delete orphan post.html
iterations.why: AdSense review weighs fresh original content; last update 30 days ago contradicts the site's own weekly claim; duplicate post.html risks a low-value-content flag

iterations.title: Honesty pass on stats and tiles: '2 Ventures'->4 (or auto-count), drop/replace the unbacked '500+' claims, fix FingerMOBA tile to 'Phaser survivor' wording, fix '2025' in essay title
iterations.why: Fabricated numbers and wrong tech claims undermine the portfolio-quality goal and are an AdSense trust risk; 5-minute edits

iterations.title: Add OG/twitter meta + canonical + favicon to all pages; add StockLens/MetalLens tiles once their certs work
iterations.why: Essays shared to WeChat/X currently render with no preview card, throttling the 引流 loop that feeds 公众号/知识星球

audits.area: CryptoLens dashboard — repo /home/test/CryptoLens-site (rAIn0x7/CryptoLens-site), live at lens.qizh.space (CNAME), Supabase backend uzvguynixndzusrlqryo.supabase.co
audits.current: Local repo in sync with origin/main @174fa41 (2026-06-01 "Wire real Binance referral"). Content pipeline ALIVE: articles_public holds 1,746 rows; newest published_at 2026-06-09T21:44:38 (~8h before audit, taken 2026-06-10T05:53Z); >=21 articles published in the prior ~13h; latest market_pulse row 2026-06-09T23:22Z (~6.5h old). BUT cadence is degraded: fetch.yml cron is '0 */2 * * *' (12 runs/day) yet market_pulse rows (written on every successful run) show only ~1-2 runs/day (06-08T04:25, 06-08T16:00, 06-09T23:22). CRITICAL: HTTPS is broken — https://lens.qizh.space serves the shared CN=*.github.io cert whose SAN does not include the domain (curl exits SSL error, HTTP 000; content only reachable with -k or plain HTTP, 200/9086B). qizh.space has the same broken cert; stocks.qizh.space has a proper CN=stocks.qizh.space cert (issued 2026-05-21), proving provisioning works per-site and lens/hub lost theirs. AdSense script (ca-pub-2184467660826262) is on all 6 pages but /ads.txt returns GitHub 404. Binance referral: sidebar uses real https://accounts.binance.com/register?ref=1216493484, but the site-wide floating button in assets/affiliate.js still points to https://www.bsmkweb.cc/register?ref=1216493484 (mirror domain). Pro checkout in assets/config.js is placeholder (LS_STORE='YOUR_STORE_SLUG').
working: Content pipeline produces fresh daily content: newest article ~8h old at audit time, 1746 total articles, Gemini-scored (>=7 filter), bilingual summaries; market pulse 6.5h old

Feed error/empty-state resilience: loadFeed has try/catch + '加载失败/Retry' error card + '暂无内容' empty card (assets/app.js:213-221); BTC websocket retries 10x then falls back to REST polling every 10s; Fear&Greed and Price Snapshot fail-safe hide their blocks on error
Sidebar Binance referral is the real URL (accounts.binance.com/register?ref=1216493484) with click tracking into Supabase affiliate_clicks
Email subscribe CTA present in 3 places (sidebar box, nav Subscribe button, subscribe.html) backed by subscribers table + weekly Resend newsletter workflow
robots.txt and sitemap.xml live and valid; canonical + OG + JSON-LD WebSite on index; AdSense script tag on every page
Mobile nav regression already fixed: <=760px nav wraps with horizontal scroll-strip filters (style.css:1177-1185); brief items show 2-line clamp on touch devices; pulse hero stacks at <=900px
Local working tree clean vs origin/main; GitHub Pages deploy model intact (content does serve, evidenced by insecure fetch returning current index.html)

issues.what: HTTPS is down for all real visitors: lens.qizh.space presents the *.github.io wildcard cert (SAN: github.io/github.com only — verified via openssl), so every https:// visit hits a full-page browser cert error. qizh.space hub has the same problem; stocks.qizh.space is fine. This alone will fail the pending AdSense review, kills shared links/SEO, and blocks Supabase/auth flows. Fix is GitHub repo Settings→Pages: remove + re-add custom domain to re-trigger cert provisioning, then Enforce HTTPS (DNS CNAME→rain0x7.github.io is already correct).

ads.txt missing: https://lens.qizh.space/ads.txt is a GitHub 404 while adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-2184467660826262 is loaded on all pages. Needs one-line file: 'google.com, pub-2184467660826262, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0'.

Pro upgrade checkout is a dead-end: assets/config.js still has LS_STORE='YOUR_STORE_SLUG' / placeholder variant IDs, so subscribe.html goCheckout() navigates to https://YOUR_STORE_SLUG.lemonsqueezy.com/... (DNS error). The only direct-revenue button on the property is broken.

Referral link inconsistency: floating 'Trade on Binance' button (assets/affiliate.js:13) points to https://www.bsmkweb.cc/register?ref=1216493484 — a Binance mirror domain, not binance.com — despite commit 174fa41 claiming the real referral was wired (only the sidebar got it). Worse: on mobile (<900px) the sidebar is display:none, so mobile users ONLY ever see the bsmkweb.cc link. Mirror domains can die or get flagged as phishing.

Pipeline cadence ~1-2 runs/day instead of the designed every-2h (market_pulse gaps of 12h and 31h prove it; About page promises 'Every 2 hours'). Likely GitHub Actions schedule throttling/failures — check 'gh run list --workflow=fetch.yml' (was blocked during this audit by a tooling outage).

Unescaped third-party HTML: renderCard()/renderBriefItem() in assets/app.js and article.html inject article.title, summary, summary_zh, editor_note and tags into innerHTML raw (escapeHtml() exists but is only used for market pulse). RSS titles containing quotes/angle brackets can break the page or inject script; tag values also break the inline onclick="filterByTag('${t}')" attribute.

SEO weak for a content site: 100% client-rendered (crawlers/social bots see skeleton divs), sitemap.xml lists only 6 static shells (article.html with no ?id= — useless), article pages have generic '<title>CryptoLens — Article' until JS runs, twitter:card=summary_large_image declared but no og:image exists anywhere, html lang="en" while default UI language is zh.

Single CDN point of failure: if cdn.jsdelivr.net (supabase-js) fails — common from China, the site's bilingual target audience — auth.js:2 throws and the entire page stays skeletons forever; Google Fonts is also CN-blocked and render-blocking.

No 公众号/知识星球 CTA or bridge to the domestic funnel anywhere on the site (only email subscribe); acceptable if CryptoLens is overseas-only by design, but currently zero cross-pollination with the domestic monetization track.

Minor perf: first feed render is serialized behind Promise.all of 6 non-critical calls (pulse, fear/greed, charts...) in index.html init(); missing preconnect to fonts.gstatic.com. Page weight itself is fine (~9KB HTML + 31KB CSS + ~30KB own JS + ~120KB supabase-js CDN).

iterations.why: Site is effectively offline for every https visitor right now; unblocks AdSense review, link sharing, SEO — prerequisite for ALL revenue paths

iterations.title: Diagnose fetch.yml cadence (gh run list / re-trigger / consider external ping or keep-alive commit)
iterations.why: Freshness is the product promise ('every 2 hours'); current ~daily runs make the Daily Brief stale by evening and weaken retention

iterations.why: Mobile likely majority of crypto-news traffic; today they see zero subscribe touchpoint in-page — retention/list growth

issues.what: [Both] Content pipeline dead: stock_articles/metal_articles contain ONLY the 5 migration-SQL seed rows each (single identical timestamp per table, newest 2026-05-21 / 2026-05-22 vs today 2026-06-10). About pages claim 'every 2 hours our pipeline fetches and Gemini-scores content' — currently false for both verticals; sites visibly show 19天前/18天前 on every card

[Both] 'Upgrade to Pro $15/mo' checkout is a dead link: goCheckout() in subscribe.html uses config.js placeholders (LS_STORE='YOUR_STORE_SLUG', variant IDs 'YOUR_MONTHLY_VARIANT_ID') — a logged-in user is redirected to a nonexistent lemonsqueezy URL. Zero possible revenue from the advertised paid plan
[Both] ads.txt missing (live 404 on both domains) — AdSense will flag 'earnings at risk' and it weakens the pending review

[Both] Daily Brief header stamps TODAY's date (new Date() in loadTodaysTop, app.js:178) while the 48h-window query falls back to all-time top-4, so '今日简报 · 2026年6月10日' sits above 19-day-old seed headlines — misleading freshness, credibility risk

[Both] Nav broken at 761–900px (verified 820px screenshot): single-row 56px nav clips — Sign In and the primary Subscribe button are cut off the right edge, ghost link buttons (ZION/CRYPTO/METALS) overflow the nav height. The wrap fix only applies <=760px (style.css:1193)

[Both] Floating 'Trade on Binance' button (affiliate.js:13) links to bsmkweb.cc mirror domain while the sidebar uses accounts.binance.com — inconsistent, looks phishy to overseas users and is an AdSense-policy/trust risk on the international-facing sites

[Both] AdSense approval risk from thin content: feeds are 100% client-side rendered from Supabase (non-JS crawlers see only skeletons), only 4 static pages + 5 seed articles per site, no og:image despite twitter:card=summary_large_image, no favicon

[Metal] Sidebar '金属' snapshot mislabels Finnhub ETF quotes as metal symbols: shows 'XAU $390.78' (that is GLD ETF) directly contradicting the hero spot price $4335, and 'XPT $15.63' — wrong-looking numbers undermine the data-product credibility

[Both] Dead CSS: .sidebar{display:none} inside @media(max-width:900px) (style.css:131) is silently overridden by the later rule at line 309 — outcome is fine today but the intent is ambiguous and fragile to reordering

audits.area: Monetization / execution audit — path to first revenue (domestic 公众号→知识星球 primary + overseas AdSense/Binance/Pro)
audits.current: Primary lever (国内: 公众号引流→知识星球付费, started 06-02) is at step 5/8. primary_log.csv: 06-02 step1 → 06-03 step4 → 06-04 step5, then FLAT at 5 for 6 straight days (06-04→06-10). Done: 星球 registered+positioned, pricing/简介, 5-10 seeded posts, 公众号 registered. Stalled step 5 = write 2-3 free desensitized 公众号 posts w/ 星球 link (plan estimates ~40min). Remaining after: step 6 wire QR to sites (~15min), step 7 seed 10 readers, step 8 first ¥99. Waiting: AdSense review 12 days (since 05-29, nudge due 06-12; ca-pub-2184467660826262 script live on all 4 index.html); TaskFlow skus API 15 days (work track, 12 days past nudge_after=3). Wiring cross-check across /home/test/Zion-site + 3 Lens repos: ZERO occurrences of 知识星球/zsxq anywhere; no 公众号 QR/link on any page (only incidental text mentions). Binance referral ref=1216493484 IS live (CryptoLens/StockLens footers + floating button via assets/affiliate.js on all 3 Lens sites, Supabase click tracking). Zion hub subscribe form is a stub: handleSubscribe() at /home/test/Zion-site/index.html:360 just hides the form — emails never stored ('wire to Substack/Supabase backend later'). All 3 Lens subscribe.html show 'Pro $15/mo / $120/yr → Upgrade' buttons whose goCheckout() builds a LemonSqueezy URL from placeholders (assets/config.js: LS_STORE='YOUR_STORE_SLUG', variant='YOUR_MONTHLY_VARIANT_ID') — any paying visitor hits a dead link. Lens FREE email subscribe is real (Supabase subscribers + newsletter.js batch send). Daily reminder automation healthy (last fire 06-10 10:10, email sent). FingerMOBA linked on hub 06-03 (card copy says 'Godot', code pivoted to Phaser survivor 06-04 — stale, cosmetic).

iterations.title: 06-12 AdSense follow-up: when nudge fires, check review status; if approved, enable Auto Ads (or place ad units — loader script alone earns nothing) and confirm ads render on lens.qizh.space
iterations.why: Second revenue line, near-zero effort once approved, but traffic is tiny so it will not be the FIRST revenue — keep it passive

iterations.title: 5-min hygiene: query Supabase affiliate_clicks for Binance click count, and fix hub card copy Godot→Phaser
iterations.why: Validates whether the referral line gets any traffic at all (data for next bet) + portfolio accuracy for the vibe-coding showcase

audits.area: GAME track — FingerMOBA web (Phaser survivor), repo /home/test/code/fingermoba, live at https://rain0x7.github.io/fingermoba/
audits.current: Live and in sync: deployed game.js is byte-identical to local/committed (10,032 bytes, 209 lines). HEAD = 716422c "pivot from MOBA slice to Survivor.io-style 幸存者生存" (last touched 2026-06-04). Gameplay state: movement is hold-toward-pointer + WASD — NO VirtualJoystick class anywhere; Phaser config is plain W=540/H=960 with Scale.FIT, no devicePixelRatio/zoom handling (blurry on phone HiDPI screens); all visuals are this.add.circle (4 call sites: player, enemies, projectiles, gems) — no textures loaded. One weapon (auto-fire at nearest, spread for multi-shot), 7-option stat-upgrade pool at level-up, no localStorage/high-score, no audio, no particles (only 50ms white tint on hit), no meta-progression. Git status: single untracked file web/_preview.html (46KB sprite-comparison page, 3 SVG schemes: A flat-rpg / B neon-arcade / C chibi-cute, dated 06-04 18:41). The 06-04 research output STILL EXISTS and is readable: /tmp/claude-1000/-home-test/4cf24ff5-92c1-4f75-bbeb-ca802976c7c8/tasks/wcyu4zp21.output (48,834 bytes, JSON, summary "Joystick + crisp HiDPI render + real 2D character sprites for the Phaser survivor game", 6 agents). Zion tile at /home/test/Zion-site/index.html:254 is stale: tag "Mobile Game · Godot · 2026", desc "竖屏单手 3v3 MOBA（指尖刀塔复刻），Godot 引擎" — game is now a Phaser survivor.
working: GitHub Pages deploy is live and exactly matches the repo — no drift between local and production
Instant load achieved: ~10KB game.js + CDN Phaser 3.80.1, replacing the old 35MB Godot wasm (commit b4a6e60)
Core survivor loop is complete and playable: wave spawning with big/small enemies, auto-fire targeting nearest, XP gems with magnet pickup, level-up 3-choice upgrades, death screen + instant restart
Dual input works: touch hold-to-move on mobile, WASD/arrows on desktop
Mobile-friendly page shell: proper viewport meta, touch-action:none, boot loader

issues.what: The ready-to-integrate research output (joystick code + HiDPI config + 3 SVG sprite sets) sits ONLY in volatile /tmp (/tmp/claude-1000/.../wcyu4zp21.output, 48KB) — one reboot or tmp cleanup and 6 agents' worth of work is gone. Nothing from it has been integrated in the 6 days since.

Zion tile copy is factually wrong for the portfolio piece: says '3v3 MOBA（指尖刀塔复刻），Godot 引擎' with tag 'Mobile Game · Godot · 2026' — the live game is a Phaser survivor. Anyone clicking through from qizh.space sees the mismatch, undermining vibe-coding-portfolio credibility.

Phone experience is sub-par on exactly the target scenario (地铁单手): no virtual joystick (hold-toward-pointer means your thumb covers the action and you drift into enemies near screen edges), and non-HiDPI 540x960 canvas renders blurry on any modern phone.
Zero session-to-session hook: no localStorage high score, so '再来一局' has no number to beat and there is no reason to return tomorrow — the single cheapest retention lever is missing.
All-circles visuals + no audio + no particles: the game reads as a programmer prototype, weakening both retention ('juice' is what makes survivor games feel good) and its value as a portfolio piece.
web/_preview.html (sprite comparison page) is untracked leftover — decision on sprite scheme A/B/C was never made, so the asset work stalled at the comparison stage.

iterations.title: Rescue the /tmp research output first: copy wcyu4zp21.output into the repo (e.g. /home/test/code/fingermoba/docs/) before anything else
iterations.why: It contains the already-produced joystick + HiDPI + sprite code; losing it to tmp cleanup means redoing the work. Zero-cost insurance for the whole visual upgrade.

iterations.title: Integrate the pending visual upgrade in one pass: VirtualJoystick + HiDPI config (width*DPR, zoom 1/DPR) + one chosen SVG sprite scheme from _preview.html
iterations.why: Directly fixes the two biggest 地铁想玩几把 blockers (thumb-blocking controls, blurry canvas) and the prototype look — and the code is already written, just needs wiring in. Biggest single jump in perceived quality per hour spent.

iterations.title: localStorage high score: persist best survival time / level / kills, show '历史最佳' on death screen and a 'NEW RECORD!' flash
iterations.why: The minimum viable retention loop — gives every run a number to beat and a reason to reopen on tomorrow's commute. ~20 lines of code.

iterations.title: Juice pass: hit/death particles, screen shake on damage taken, WebAudio-synthesized bleeps (shoot/kill/level-up/death) — no asset files needed
iterations.why: Survivor-genre retention lives on feel; kills that pop and sounds that reward are what turn '玩一把' into '再来三把'. Also lifts portfolio quality.

iterations.title: Weapon variety: add 2-3 distinct weapons to the upgrade pool (orbiting blade, AoE nova, chain lightning) so level-ups change playstyle, not just numbers
iterations.why: Current 7 upgrades are all stat tweaks — runs feel identical by minute 3. Build variety is the genre's core mid-term retention mechanic.

iterations.title: Fix the Zion tile copy (Zion-site/index.html:254): tag → 'Web Game · Phaser · 2026', desc → 竖屏单手幸存者生存/秒开 web 游戏; drop the FingerMOBA-as-MOBA framing or rename display title
iterations.why: qizh.space is the funnel for the whole personal brand; a wrong engine + wrong genre description on the portfolio piece directly damages the vibe-coding credibility the game exists to demonstrate. 5-minute fix.

iterations.title: Meta-progression (局外成长): drop coins, persist them in localStorage, pre-run shop for permanent +HP/+dmg/+speed
iterations.why: The deepest retention layer — converts dead runs into progress. Worth doing only after joystick/HiDPI/high-score land, since it multiplies an experience that must first feel good.

iterations.title: Housekeeping: after picking sprite scheme, delete or commit web/_preview.html and commit the integrated upgrade in one clean commit
iterations.why: Keeps the public Pages repo clean (it doubles as portfolio source code people may read) and closes the dangling 6-day-old decision.
